# Extracao: transcription_mp4_8__PAYMENT_CLOSE_-_BUDGET_SUMMARY_CLOSE_

- **Tipo:** TXT

---

Hey, Grant, the payments are too high, and I understand your concerns, sir. Look, I pay for things the same way everybody else by the month. And if it's not in the budget, it's not in the budget. But let me ask you this. If you could pay all your bills, entertain yourself, tuck away money for savings, and have enough money to pay for this purchase, would you own it? Once you get a yes, then ask this question. Great. So how much is your rent? Yes, gas, food, credit cards, education, medical, recreation, savings, insurance, make a list, you're looking for a surplus. And by the way, if you don't get a surplus, don't assume that means you can't close this deal. You might still be able to close this deal.
